prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility patterns for ICE (Intercontinental Exchange), I estimated an annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. For an 18-day period, this translates to roughly 3-6% price movement range. The point estimate assumes slight upward drift typical of financial exchanges. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with increasing width for higher confidence levels, accounting for potential market volatility and the uncertainty inherent in short-term price predictions.
